---
title: "Henry Graves"
---

## Henry Graves

**Dates:** (1806-1892)

### Description

would-be contributor

### Biography

The reference to a sculpture of John Coleridge Patteson in the letter refusing an article called ‘Second Fiddles’ suggests that it may have been addressed to the print seller of that name, although the identification is not certain.

### Letters

- Letter from April 24th 1875

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
